sessions.summary:
Ayeluna "Lou" becomes an initiate of the Mages of High Sorcery. Bud Turtlefoot and Zacharia Horn-Axe find a temple with some statues of the gods reformed and get divine powers. Kena Price and Sibyl Eirlynn, while escorting Lord Bakarishome, run into some monsters on the road and kill them with the help of the rest of the party and Ispin Greenshield. 

The party arrived in Vogler, a small fishing village on the Vingaard River that most of the party are very familiar with. Vogler was a flurry of activity, with villagers preparing for the upcoming Kingfisher Festival. Ispin introduced the party to Cudgel Ironsmile, a dwarven woman who leads the Ironclad Mercenaries. Her group is planning on participating in the Battle of High Hill - a reenactment of that famous battle that happens every year at the climax of the festival. Cudgel offered to walk with Ispin on his nightly
